name: Use Of Hidden Paths Or Files
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: David Burkett, @signalblur
SIGMA Title: Use Of Hidden Paths Or Files
SIGMA Description: Detects calls to hidden files or files located in hidden directories in NIX systems.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.%') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.cache/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.config/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.pyenv/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.rustup/toolchains%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Use Of Hidden Paths Or Files on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.%') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.cache/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.config/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.pyenv/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/.rustup/toolchains%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Use Of Hidden Paths Or Files
